title: Button
description: The primary action of any interface. Four variants, five semantic colors, four sizes, configurable icons, loading state and support for rendering as a link or any element.

variants.title: Variants
variants.desc: Four visual styles for different levels of action hierarchy in the interface.

colors.title: Colors
colors.desc: Five semantic colors that map directly to the ModoProvider design token system.

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.desc: Padding, font and height scale proportionally at each level.

icons.title: With icons
icons.desc: Left, right or icon-only position. Use aria-label on icon-only buttons.

states.title: States
states.desc: Loading blocks clicks and shows spinner. Disabled prevents all interaction.

gradient.title: Gradient
gradient.desc: Gradient fill for a more premium visual look on supported colors.

radius.title: Radius
radius.desc: Corner radius from sharp edges to fully rounded pills.

link.title: As link
link.desc: Render as an anchor tag while keeping button styling. Useful for navigation that looks like a CTA.

skeleton.title: Skeleton
skeleton.desc: Show a skeleton placeholder with the same footprint while data or context is loading.

props.variant: Visual variant. Normal is the solid button (default).
props.color: Semantic color applied to the button.
props.size: Controls padding, font size and height.
props.radius: Corner radius. Overrides the active radius from ModoProvider when set.
props.label: Button text. Equivalent to the default slot for plain content.
props.type: HTML button type attribute. Use 'submit' inside forms.
props.loading: Shows a spinner and blocks clicks while active.
props.loadingText: Text shown alongside the spinner during loading state.
props.disabled: Visually disables the button and prevents all interaction.
props.icon: Icon component rendered next to the label (heroicons or any component).
props.iconPosition: Side where the icon appears relative to the label.
props.fullWidth: Button expands to fill 100% of available width.
props.gradient: Apply a gradient background on supported colors.
props.skeleton: Render a skeleton placeholder instead of the real button.
props.as: Root element to render. Use "a" for links or a router-link component.
props.ariaLabel: Accessible label. Required for icon-only buttons without visible text.

emits.click: Emitted on click when the button is not disabled or in loading state.

slots.default: Custom button content. Replaces the label prop when HTML or inner components are needed.

types.title: Button
types.desc: TypeScript interface for the Button component props. All props are optional and have sensible defaults.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.ariaType: Prevents accidental form submission when the button is inside a form element
a11y.ariaDisabled: Communicates disabled state to assistive technologies
a11y.ariaBusy: Communicates loading state while the action is in progress
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name for icon-only buttons (no visible text)
a11y.focusNative: Uses a native button element — participates in the tab order by default
a11y.focusDisabled: Excluded from the tab order when the disabled prop is true
a11y.focusRing: Focus ring is always visible; style is controlled by the focusHalo setting in ModoConfig
